item.title: Farm Equipment Not Ready Yet
item.description: A look at farm equipment that isn’t ready for use, showing preparation delays, troubleshooting, and real challenges in getting machines field-ready.

media:content.media:title: Farm Equipment Not Ready Yet
media:content.media:description: A look at farm equipment that isn’t ready for use, showing preparation delays, troubleshooting, and real challenges in getting machines field-ready.

item.title: Skid Vac vs Rocks on the Farm
item.description: A skid steer vacuum is tested against rocks, showing cleaning power, durability, and real farm equipment performance in tough conditions.

media:content.media:title: Skid Vac vs Rocks on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A skid steer vacuum is tested against rocks, showing cleaning power, durability, and real farm equipment performance in tough conditions.

item.title: New Farm Tiller Ready for the Field
item.description: A new tiller is prepared for field work, showing setup, testing, and readiness for soil preparation and agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: New Farm Tiller Ready for the Field
media:content.media:description: A new tiller is prepared for field work, showing setup, testing, and readiness for soil preparation and agricultural operations.

item.title: Fields Still Too Wet for Farming
item.description: Wet field conditions delay farm work, showing muddy terrain, equipment limitations, and challenges of timing agricultural operations after rain.

media:content.media:title: Fields Still Too Wet for Farming
media:content.media:description: Wet field conditions delay farm work, showing muddy terrain, equipment limitations, and challenges of timing agricultural operations after rain.

item.title: Building with Giant LEGO Blocks
item.description: Large-scale LEGO-style blocks are used in a creative build, showing oversized pieces, hands-on construction, and playful engineering on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Building with Giant LEGO Blocks
media:content.media:description: Large-scale LEGO-style blocks are used in a creative build, showing oversized pieces, hands-on construction, and playful engineering on the farm.

item.title: Trying a New Farm Painting Project
item.description: A new painting project is tested on the farm, showing preparation, application techniques, and creative experimentation with equipment and surfaces.

media:content.media:title: Trying a New Farm Painting Project
media:content.media:description: A new painting project is tested on the farm, showing preparation, application techniques, and creative experimentation with equipment and surfaces.

item.title: Looking Back at Corn Harvest Methods
item.description: A reflection on past corn harvesting techniques without chopping cornheads, showing equipment changes and how farming practices have evolved over time.

media:content.media:title: Looking Back at Corn Harvest Methods
media:content.media:description: A reflection on past corn harvesting techniques without chopping cornheads, showing equipment changes and how farming practices have evolved over time.

item.title: Two Weeks of Farm Work Completed
item.description: A summary of two weeks of farm operations, showing progress, completed tasks, and steady work across fields, equipment use, and daily agricultural routines.

media:content.media:title: Two Weeks of Farm Work Completed
media:content.media:description: A summary of two weeks of farm operations, showing progress, completed tasks, and steady work across fields, equipment use, and daily agricultural routines.

item.title: Gravel Haul Completed by Farm Team
item.description: A farm team works together to haul gravel, showing loading, transport, and teamwork in maintaining and improving rural property and field access.

media:content.media:title: Gravel Haul Completed by Farm Team
media:content.media:description: A farm team works together to haul gravel, showing loading, transport, and teamwork in maintaining and improving rural property and field access.

item.title: Dirt Work Begins for New Grain Bins
item.description: Construction starts with dirt work for new grain bins, showing excavation, site prep, and early steps in expanding farm storage infrastructure.

media:content.media:title: Dirt Work Begins for New Grain Bins
media:content.media:description: Construction starts with dirt work for new grain bins, showing excavation, site prep, and early steps in expanding farm storage infrastructure.
